title: Mossel Bay Municipality places third at annual Service Excellence Awards
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality was awarded bronze at the annual Service Excellence Awards (SEA), held at The Market Hall in Cape Town last night, 12 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality was awarded bronze at the annual Service Excellence Awards (SEA), held at The Market Hall in Cape Town last night, 12 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to a Facebook post by the Mossel Bay Municipality, the event, which is hosted by the Western Cape Government, is to recognise and celebrate exceptional service delivery."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The awards saw Drakenstein Municipality place first, the Swartland Municipality second and Mossel Bay Municipality place third.","html":"The awards saw Drakenstein Municipality place first, the Swartland Municipality second and Mossel Bay Municipality place third."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is the 10th year the awards have been held.","html":"This is the 10th year the awards have been held."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Mossel Bay Municipality places third at annual Service Excellence Awards
